prompt:
Goal: Create a cinematic morning poster for Hangzhou good morning, West Lake has light, blending a soft-sunrise landscape photograph with elegant editorial typography and Chinese lifestyle-poster design.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 horizontal composition, 1200 x 675 px feel, with generous negative space in the pale sky and lake reflection. Overall mood is calm, warm, poetic, and slightly nostalgic.

Main image: A misty lakeside sunrise at West Lake, Hangzhou. The sun glows intensely near the upper-right over a quiet lake, with golden haze, soft bloom, lens flare, and softened silhouettes of distant trees, a small arched bridge, and faint city buildings on the far shore. In the lower-right/middle foreground, show exactly 1 cyclist riding left-to-right along the lakeside path, intentionally motion-blurred with a faint ghosting/trailing effect; the rider wears a blue top and dark shorts, the bicycle wheels are blurred. Foreground pavement and grass are dark green-black with warm highlights, slightly smeared by motion blur.

Visual style: Photorealistic base image with heavy atmospheric haze, softened contours, warm first-light color grading, subtle residual-image blur, creamy highlights, muted sage-green shadows, amber sun flare, premium travel-magazine poster aesthetic. Keep the typography crisp white and orange against the dreamy background.

Layout and typography: Place a huge handwritten white script title “Soft Sunrise” across the upper-left to upper-middle, thin elegant strokes with a long underline flourish extending toward the right. Beneath it on the left, add large white Chinese serif characters in two stacked lines: “杭州早安” and “西湖有光”. Add small orange spaced italic text “2026 lake note” between the Chinese title lines. At the top-right, add white uppercase serif text in exactly 2 lines: “FIRST LIGHT” and “2026-07-20 · MONDAY”. Along the far-left margin, add a small circular “HZ” monogram near the top and a vertical white divider line, plus vertical text reading “HANGZHOU / WEST LAKE / 20 JUL 2026”. At the bottom-left, add orange handwritten Chinese text “让心情像湖面一样轻” above a bold white Chinese label “今日宜”, followed by a small white recommendation line: “宜｜慢走 观荷 轻声说早安    忌｜喧闹 迟疑 错过水色”. At the bottom-right, add a small orange outlined square stamp containing exactly 4 stacked elements: “HZ”, “07·20”, “MON”, and a thin border.

Text content parameters: Use Soft Sunrise for the large handwritten English title, 2026-07-20 · MONDAY for the top-right date, HANGZHOU / WEST LAKE / 20 JUL 2026 for the side caption, and 让心情像湖面一样轻 for the bottom handwritten quote.

Constraints: Include exactly 1 cyclist, 1 sun, 1 distant arched bridge, 1 circular HZ monogram, and 1 orange square date stamp. Do not add extra people, cars, boats, birds, QR codes, or watermarks. Preserve the airy negative space and keep all text clean, legible, and integrated like a refined social-media morning greeting poster.

Goal: Create a cinematic morning poster for Hangzhou good morning, West Lake has light, blending a soft-sunrise landscape photograph with elegant editorial typography and Chinese lifestyle-poster design.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 horizontal composition, 1200 x 675 px feel, with generous negative space in the pale sky and lake reflection. Overall mood is calm, warm, poetic, and slightly nostalgic.

promptZh:
目标：创作一张电影感的晨间海报，主题为 杭州早安，西湖有光，将柔和的日出风景摄影与优雅的编辑排版及中式生活方式海报设计相结合。

画布：宽幅 16:9 横向构图，1200 x 675 像素质感，在浅色天空和湖面反射处留出充裕的负空间。整体氛围宁静、温暖、诗意且略带怀旧感。

主体图像：杭州西湖雾气缭绕的日出景象。太阳在右上角附近发出强烈光芒，照耀着宁静的湖面，伴有金色雾霾、柔光效果、镜头光晕，以及远方树木、一座小拱桥和远岸模糊城市建筑的轮廓。在右下方/中前景处，展示 1 名骑行者正沿湖边小径从左向右骑行，刻意呈现动态模糊效果，带有淡淡的重影/拖尾感；骑行者身穿蓝色上衣和深色短裤，自行车轮模糊。前景路面和草地呈深绿黑色，带有暖色高光，被动态模糊轻微晕染。

视觉风格：以写实摄影为基础，带有浓重的空气感雾霾、柔和的轮廓、暖色调的首光调色、细腻的残影模糊、奶油般的高光、柔和的鼠尾草绿阴影、琥珀色太阳光晕，呈现高端旅游杂志海报的美学。在梦幻的背景下，保持排版文字为清晰的白色和橙色。

布局与排版：在左上至中上部放置巨大的白色手写体标题“Soft Sunrise”，笔触纤细优雅，末端带有向右延伸的长下划线。在其下方左侧，添加两行堆叠的大号白色中文字体：“杭州早安”和“西湖有光”。在中文标题行之间添加橙色小号间距斜体文字“2026 lake note”。在右上角，添加两行白色大写衬线字体：“FIRST LIGHT”和“2026-07-20 · MONDAY”。沿最左侧边缘，在顶部附近添加一个小圆形“HZ”字母组合标志和一条垂直白色分割线，以及垂直文字“HANGZHOU / WEST LAKE / 20 JUL 2026”。在左下角，添加橙色手写中文“让心情像湖面一样轻”，上方为粗体白色中文标签“今日宜”，后跟一行白色小字推荐：“宜｜慢走 观荷 轻声说早安    忌｜喧闹 迟疑 错过水色”。在右下角，添加一个橙色轮廓小方印，内含 4 个堆叠元素：“HZ”、“07·20”、“MON”以及一个细边框。

文本内容参数：使用 Soft Sunrise 作为大号手写英文标题，2026-07-20 · MONDAY 作为右上角日期，HANGZHOU / WEST LAKE / 20 JUL 2026 作为侧边说明文字，以及 让心情像湖面一样轻 作为底部手写引语。

约束条件：包含且仅包含 1 名骑行者、1 个太阳、1 座远方拱桥、1 个圆形 HZ 标志和 1 个橙色方形日期印章。不要添加额外的人、车、船、鸟、二维码或水印。保留通透的负空间，并确保所有文字清晰、易读，且像精致的社交媒体晨间问候海报一样融为一体。
